overall_rationale: To assess the semiconductor companies' dependence on TSMC, I've selected ON Semiconductor, a significant company in the industry, alongside TSMC itself. Analyzing 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K forms over the last three years will offer comprehensive insights into how these companies describe reliance on TSMC.
